bits.append("ngân hàng") 194 elif route == "CYCLICAL": bits.append("hàng hóa chu kỳ") 195 if m5 and m5["tier"] == "WIDE": bits.append("hào BỀN") 196 elif m5 and m5["tier"] == "NONE": bits.append("KHÔNG hào (ROE chu kỳ)") 197 ddv = now.get("dd") if now else None 198 deep = (ddv == ddv and ddv is not None and ddv <= -0.30) 199 cheap = bool(now and ((now.get("pe_z") == now.get("pe_z") and now.get("pe_z") is not None and now.get("pe_z") < -1) 200 or (now.get("pb_z") == now.get("pb_z") and now.get("pb_z") is not None and now.get("pb_z") < -1))) 201 regname = reg["name"] if reg else "?" 202 tail = [] 203 if reg and reg["state"] >= 3: tail.append(f"regime {regname} chưa ưu tiên FA") 204 elif reg: tail.append(f"regime {regname} = FA-edge mạnh") 205 if deep: tail.append("dd sâu = panic") 206 if cheap: tail.append("rẻ-vs-lịch-sử (z<−1)") 207 verdict_buy = (cheap and deep and m5 and m5["tier"] == "WIDE" and reg and reg["state"] <= 2) 208 lead = " · ".join(bits) if bits else "—" 209 cond = ("; ".join(tail)) if tail else "không tín hiệu nổi bật" 210 closer = "→ vùng MUA-KHI-SỢ đáng chú ý." if verdict_buy else "→ THEO DÕI, chưa phải mua-ngay (gate, không phải buy signal)." 211 return f"{lead}. {cond}. {closer}" 212 213 214 if __name__ == "__main__": 215 import sys 216 for a in sys.argv[1:]: 217 print(build_report(a)); print() 218

file.content: #!/usr/bin/env python3 """ dna_report.py — 2-block (DNA + NOW) Telegram report renderer for the 8L bot\[BINARY_STRIPPED] Imported by telegram_8l_bot.py (the existing interactive long-poll bot — NOT rebuilt). `build_report(tk)` returns a Telegram-HTML string laid out as TWO CLOCKS: 🧬 DNA (slow, structural — "what the company IS"): route · engine · moat+5F+risk1 · runway/TAM · margin-cycle. Sourced from CACHED files (these change per quarter/year, so caching is correct — no live cost paid for slow data). ⚡ NOW (fast, live AT QUERY TIME — "where it stands today"): price · valuation-vs- own-history · drawdown · liquidity · Ngũ-Hành market regime · 8L rank. The price/valuation/regime lines are queried LIVE from BigQuery on each call. Design rationale: only the NOW block pays the live-query cost; the DNA block (moat, engine, TAM) is slow-moving so it reads cached unified_screener/dna_cards/moat_tags. Each block is stamped with its own freshness so nothing pretends to be more live than it is. Run standalone for a quick text preview: `python dna_report.py VCS`. """ import os, re, time, tempfile, subprocess from io import StringIO import pandas as pd, numpy as np W = os.environ.get("WORKDIR_8L", r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude") PROJECT = "[REDACTED]" BQ_BIN = os.environ.get("BQ_BIN", (r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd" if os.name == "nt" else "bq")) # 5-state Ngũ Hành regime: state -> (name, target weight, emoji). Values are 1..5 in vnindex_5state. STATE_MAP = {1: ("CRISIS", "0%", "🔴"), 2: ("BEAR", "20%", "🟠"), 3: ("NEUTRAL", "70%", "🟡"), 4: ("BULL", "100%", "🟢"), 5: ("EX-BULL", "130%", "🔵")} _REGIME_CACHE = {"t": 0.0, "val": None} # avoid re-querying regime on every message (5-min TTL) def _bq(sql): with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".sql", delete=False, encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(sql); tmp = f.name try: cat = "type" if os.name == "nt" else "cat" r = subprocess.run(f'{cat} "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=10', capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=90, shell=True) finally: try: os.unlink(tmp) except Exception: pass try: return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip())) except Exception: return pd.DataFrame() def get_regime(): """Latest market state, live (cached 5 min). Source = vnindex_5state_dt5g_live (the TRUE production DT5G regime, fail-safe to DT4 — same series golive_recommend + pt_v4_dt5g consume). NOT the bare `vnindex_5state` table, which is the v3.4b BASE (TQ34b, no DT-gate/macro), repointed [REDACTED]03 to stop the bot reporting the base regime instead of the live DT5G one.""" if _REGIME_CACHE["val"] is not None and (time.time() - _REGIME_CACHE["t"]) < 300: return _REGIME_CACHE["val"] d = _bq("SELECT t.time, t.state FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live t ORDER BY t.time DESC LIMIT 1") val = None if len(d): st = int(d.iloc[0]["state"]); nm, wt, em = STATE_MAP.get(st, ("?", "?", "⚪")) val = {"state": st, "name": nm, "weight": wt, "emoji": em, "asof": str(d.iloc[0]["time"])} _REGIME_CACHE.update(t=time.time(), val=val) return val def live_now(tk): """Live one-ticker snapshot at query time: price, %chg, valuation-vs-history, dd, liquidity.""" d = _bq(f"""WITH lt AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.time) mx FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker='{tk}' AND t.PB IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.ticker), hiw AS (SELECT MAX(t.Close) hi FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker='{tk}' AND t.time>=DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(),INTERVAL 365 DAY)) SELECT t.time, t.Close, t.Price, ROUND(t.PE,1) PE, ROUND((t.PE-t.PE_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PE_SD5Y,0),2) pe_z, ROUND(t.PB,2) PB, ROUND((t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0),2) pb_z, ROUND(t.Close/NULLIF(t.Close_T1,0)-1,4) chg, ROUND(t.Close/NULLIF((SELECT hi FROM hiw),0)-1,2) dd, ROUND(COALESCE(t.Price,t.Close)*t.Volume_3M_P50/1e9,1) liqB FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN lt ON lt.ticker=t.ticker AND lt.mx=t.time WHERE t.ticker='{tk}'""") return d.iloc[0].to_dict() if len(d) else None def _s(v): """Clean a possibly-NaN/'nan' cell to a display string ('' if empty).""" if v is None or (isinstance(v, float) and pd.isna(v)): return "" s = str(v).strip() return "" if s.lower() == "nan" else s def _f(v, suf="", mul=1, plus=False, dec=0): if v is None or (isinstance(v, float) and pd.isna(v)): return "n/a" s = f"{v*mul:+.{dec}f}" if plus else f"{v*mul:.{dec}f}" return s + suf def build_report(tk): tk = tk.upper() # ---- cached structural sources (DNA — slow-moving, caching is correct) ---- try: scr = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W, "data", "unified_screener.csv")).set_index("ticker") except Exception: scr = pd.DataFrame() try: rank = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W, "data", "rank_8l.csv")) except Exception: rank = pd.DataFrame() try: dna = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W, "data", "dna_cards.csv")).set_index("ticker") except Exception: dna = pd.DataFrame() try: from moat_5f import load_moat_tags; MOAT5F = load_moat_tags(W) except Exception: MOAT5F = {} in_univ = len(scr) and tk in scr.index s = scr.loc[tk] if in_univ else None route = s["route"] if in_univ else "?" verdict = s["verdict"] if in_univ else "?" action = s.get("action", "") if in_univ else "" engine = str(s.get("engine", "") or "") if in_univ else "" dcard = dna.loc[tk].to_dict() if (len(dna) and tk in dna.index) else {} m5 = MOAT5F.get(tk) # rank position (cached EOD — rank is a prioritization, recomputed nightly) rkline = "—" if len(rank): rr = rank[rank["ticker"] == tk] if len(rr): r0 = rr.iloc[0]; rkline = f"#{int(r0['rank'])}/{len(rank)} · score {r0['score']:.0f}" elif in_univ: rkline = "GATED (AVOID/distressed)" # ---- live block (NOW — queried at message time) ---- now = live_now(tk) reg = get_regime() # ===== assemble ===== L = [] struct = dcard.get("struct") has_struct = route == "CYCLICAL" and struct is not None and pd.notna(struct) and str(struct).strip() not in ("", "nan") head_route = f"{route}" + (f"/{struct}" if has_struct else "") L.append(f"📊 {tk} — {head_route} · {rkline}") # --- DNA block --- L.append("──────── 🧬 DNA (cấu trúc, đổi chậm) ────────") if in_univ: # verdict/action covers the WHOLE universe (screener), so DNA is never empty L.append(f"Verdict: {verdict}" + (f" · {action}" if action and str(action) != "nan" else "")) if engine and engine != "nan": L.append(f"Engine : {engine}" + (f" ROIC {_f(dcard.get('roic'),'%',1)}" if dcard.get("roic") == dcard.get("roic") else "")) # moat: numeric proxy + 5F durability verdict + kill-condition moat_proxy = _s(dcard.get("moat")) moat_type = _s(dcard.get("moat_type")) or (m5["type"] if m5 else "") if m5: L.append(f"Moat : {m5['tier']} [{m5['type']}]" + (f" · số:{moat_proxy}" if moat_proxy else "")) L.append(f" ⚠ risk#1: {m5['risk1']}") elif moat_proxy: L.append(f"Moat : {moat_proxy}" + (f" [{moat_type}]" if moat_type else "") + " (chưa tag 5F)") runway, tam = _s(dcard.get("runway")), _s(dcard.get("tam")) if runway: L.append(f"TAM : {runway}" + (f" [{tam}]" if tam else "")) mcyc = _s(dcard.get("margin_cycle")) if mcyc and mcyc != "n/a": L.append(f"Margin : {mcyc}") # --- NOW block --- asof = str(now["time"])[:10] if now else "?" L.append(f"──────── ⚡ NOW (live {asof}) ────────") if now: chg = now.get("chg"); chg_s = _f(chg, "%", 100, plus=True, dec=1) if chg == chg else "n/a" ddv = now.get("dd"); blood = " 🩸" if (ddv == ddv and ddv <= -0.30) else "" L.append(f"Giá : {_f(now.get('Price') or now.get('Close'), '', 1, dec=1)} ({chg_s} phiên) · dd 52w {_f(ddv,'%',100,plus=True)}{blood}") L.append(f"Định giá: PE {now.get('PE')} · pe_z {_f(now.get('pe_z'),'',1,plus=True,dec=1)} · PB {now.get('PB')} · pb_z {_f(now.get('pb_z'),'',1,plus=True,dec=1)}") liq = now.get("liqB"); dep = " ✅" if (liq == liq and liq >= 4) else (" ⚠️thin" if liq == liq else "") L.append(f"Thanh kh: {_f(liq,' tỷ/phiên',1,dec=0)}{dep}") else: L.append("Giá/định giá: n/a (không lấy được dữ liệu live)") if reg: edge = "FA-edge mạnh" if reg["state"] <= 2 else ("FA-edge yếu" if reg["state"] >= 3 else "") L.append(f"Regime : {reg['emoji']} {reg['name']} ({reg['weight']}) · {edge} [{reg['asof']}]") # flags flags = [] det = str(s["detail"]) if in_univ else "" if "VALUE_TRAP" in str(verdict) or "VALUE_TRAP" in det: flags.append("⚑ VALUE_TRAP→event_check") if dcard.get("asset_play") in (True, "True"): flags.append("⚑ ASSET_PLAY→NAV") ev = dcard.get("event") if ev is not None and pd.notna(ev) and str(ev).strip() not in ("", "nan"): flags.append(f"⚑ EVENT: {ev}") if m5 and m5["tier"] == "NONE": flags.append("⚑ no-moat: ROE cao = chu kỳ/transient") if flags: L.append("Cờ : " + "\n ".join(flags)) # --- quick read (gate-style synthesis, not a buy signal) --- L.append("──────── 🎯 ĐỌC NHANH ────────") L.append(_quick_read(tk, route, verdict, engine, now, reg, m5)) # freshness footer L.append(f"Data: giá live {asof} · FA quý (cache) · moat asof {(m5['asof'] if m5 else '—')}") return "\n".join(L) def _quick_read(tk, route, verdict, engine, now, reg, m5): bits = [] if "COMPOUNDER" in str(engine): bits.append("compounder thật") elif route == "BANK": bits.append("ngân hàng") elif route == "CYCLICAL": bits.append("hàng hóa chu kỳ") if m5 and m5["tier"] == "WIDE": bits.append("hào BỀN") elif m5 and m5["tier"] == "NONE": bits.append("KHÔNG hào (ROE chu kỳ)") ddv = now.get("dd") if now else None deep = (ddv == ddv and ddv is not None and ddv <= -0.30) cheap = bool(now and ((now.get("pe_z") == now.get("pe_z") and now.get("pe_z") is not None and now.get("pe_z") < -1) or (now.get("pb_z") == now.get("pb_z") and now.get("pb_z") is not None and now.get("pb_z") < -1))) regname = reg["name"] if reg else "?" tail = [] if reg and reg["state"] >= 3: tail.append(f"regime {regname} chưa ưu tiên FA") elif reg: tail.append(f"regime {regname} = FA-edge mạnh") if deep: tail.append("dd sâu = panic") if cheap: tail.append("rẻ-vs-lịch-sử (z<−1)") verdict_buy = (cheap and deep and m5 and m5["tier"] == "WIDE" and reg and reg["state"] <= 2) lead = " · ".join(bits) if bits else "—" cond = ("; ".join(tail)) if tail else "không tín hiệu nổi bật" closer = "→ vùng MUA-KHI-SỢ đáng chú ý." if verdict_buy else "→ THEO DÕI, chưa phải mua-ngay (gate, không phải buy signal)." return f"{lead}. {cond}. {closer}" if __name__ == "__main__": import sys for a in sys.argv[1:]: print(build_report(a)); print()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
integrated_overlay_realistic.py  — (e) honest overlay using ACTUAL idle-cash frac\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
The +4.6pp overlay (integrated_capitulation_overlay.py) assumed 100% of NAV is
redeployed during DT5G CRISIS. Reality: the core is only PARTLY parked. The
core's realized equity exposure over a window = its daily BETA to the market;
so idle-cash fraction f = clip(1 - beta, 0, 1). Only that f is redeployed:
   overlay_daily_ret = f*basket_ret + (1-f)*core_ret
Reports baseline vs realistic-f vs sensitivity grid (f=0.5/0.7/1.0).
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import os, sys, io, subprocess
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd

WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"; SDK_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin"
COST=0.003; H=60
def bq(sql):
    env=dict(os.environ); env["PATH"]=env.get("PATH","")+os.pathsep+SDK_BIN
    env.setdefault("CLOUDSDK_PYTHON",SDK_BIN+r"\..\platform\bundledpython\python.exe")
    o=subprocess.run([SDK_BIN+r"\bq.cmd","query","--use_legacy_sql=false",f"--project_id={PROJECT}",
        "--format=csv","--max_rows=200000"," ".join(sql.split())],capture_output=True,text=True,env=env)
    if o.returncode!=0: raise RuntimeError(o.stdout+o.stderr)
    return pd.read_csv(io.StringIO(o.stdout))

core=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","5sys_prodspec_201401_202605_dt5g.csv"),parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")
D=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","daily_comovement_dt5g.csv"),parse_dates=["time"]).sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True)
D["ew"]=(1+D["avg_ret"]).cumprod()
ew=D.set_index("time")["ew"]; ew_ret=ew.pct_change()
state_by=D.set_index("time")["state"]
def declust(d,gap=30):
    d=d.sort_values("time").copy();d["g"]=d["time"].diff().dt.days.fillna(999);d["c"]=(d["g"]>=gap).cumsum()
    return d.groupby("c").first()["time"].tolist()
deploy=[d for d in declust(D[D["pct_oversold"]>=0.40]) if int(state_by.get(pd.Timestamp(d),3))==1]

else:

    for d in deploy:

        q=bq(f"""WITH elig AS (SELECT p.ticker, SAFE_DIVIDE(p.PB-p.PB_MA5Y,p.PB_SD5Y) pbz0 FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune p
          WHERE p.time=DATE '{ds}' AND p.ROE_Min5Y>=0.12 AND p.ROIC5Y>=0.10 AND p.FSCORE>=6
            AND COALESCE(p.Price,p.Close)*p.Volume/1e9>=2)
          SELECT f.time,f.ticker,f.Close,e.pbz0 FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune f JOIN elig e USING(ticker)
          WHERE f.time>=DATE '{ds}' AND f.time<=DATE_ADD(DATE '{ds}',INTERVAL 130 DAY) ORDER BY f.ticker,f.time""")
        q["time"]=pd.to_datetime(q["time"]); pbz0=q.groupby("ticker")["pbz0"].first()
        g=pbz0[pbz0<-1].index.tolist(); c=pbz0[pbz0<0].index.tolist(); a=pbz0.index.tolist()
        names=g if len(g)>=3 else (c if len(c)>=3 else a)
        px=q[q.ticker.isin(names)].pivot(index="time",columns="ticker",values="Close").sort_index().ffill().iloc[:H+1]
        nav=px.div(px.iloc[0]).mean(axis=1); nav=nav/nav.iloc[0]
        frames.append(pd.DataFrame({"event":str(ds),"time":nav.index,"nav":nav.values}))
    B=pd.concat(frames); B.to_csv(cache,index=False)

idx=core.index
def build_overlay(col, fmode):
    base=core[col]; ret=base.pct_change().fillna(0).values.copy(); cret=ret.copy()
    notes=[]
    for d in deploy:
        ds=str(pd.Timestamp(d).date()); bk=B[B["event"]==ds].set_index("time")["nav"]
        if len(bk)<5: continue
        i0=idx.searchsorted(pd.Timestamp(d)); bret=bk.pct_change().fillna(0).values
        n=min(H,len(bret)-1,len(idx)-1-i0)
        win=slice(i0+1,i0+1+n)
        # core's equity exposure over the window = beta to EW market
        cwin=pd.Series(cret[win]); mwin=ew_ret.reindex(idx[win]).fillna(0).values
        var=np.var(mwin)
        beta=float(np.cov(cwin,mwin)[0,1]/var) if var>0 else 1.0
        if   fmode=="real": f=min(max(1-beta,0),1)
        else: f=float(fmode)
        ret[win]=f*bret[1:1+n]+(1-f)*cret[win]
        ret[i0+1]-=COST*f; ret[i0+n]-=COST*f
        notes.append((ds,round(beta,2),round(f,2)))
    return pd.Series(np.cumprod(1+ret),index=idx), notes

def metrics(nav):

    return (nav.iloc[-1]**(1/yrs)-1)*100, (nav/nav.cummax()-1).min()*100, r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)

redeployed during DT5G CRISIS. Reality: the core is only PARTLY parked. The
core's realized equity exposure over a window = its daily BETA to the market;
so idle-cash fraction f = clip(1 - beta, 0, 1). Only that f is redeployed:
   overlay_daily_ret = f*basket_ret + (1-f)*core_ret

    o=subprocess.run([SDK_BIN+r"\bq.cmd","query","--use_legacy_sql=false",f"--project_id={PROJECT}",
        "--format=csv","--max_rows=200000"," ".join(sql.split())],capture_output=True,text=True,env=env)
    if o.returncode!=0: raise RuntimeError(o.stdout+o.stderr)

    return d.groupby("c").first()["time"].tolist()

    B=pd.concat(frames); B.to_csv(cache,index=False)

=== papertrade_daily.bat ===
@echo off
REM Daily paper-trade orchestrator — runs 4 sims + comparison.
REM Triggered by Windows Task Scheduler at 15:30 daily.
REM Logs each run to data\papertrade_run_YYYY-MM-DD.log
REM
REM Updated 2026-05-27:
REM  - Removed pt_v12_live (V3 alt state test, no longer needed)
REM  - UPGRADED V11: KELLY ETF + DT_10_25_25 state (validated +1.90pp Full CAGR)
REM  - Renamed versions to architecture-based names for clarity:
REM    V11        = Song Sinh (BAL+VN30) + KELLY + DT_10_25_25  ⭐ upgraded
REM    V12        = Am Duong (BAL+LAGGED) + TQ34b
REM    V121_ENS   = V12.1 + Ensemble (M1+M3r AND-HOLD) + TQ34b + BASE
REM    V121_Kelly = V121_ENS + Kelly NEUTRAL parking {3:1.0}

setlocal
set WORKDIR=/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude
set TODAY=%date:~10,4%-%date:~4,2%-%date:~7,2%
set LOGFILE=%WORKDIR%\data\papertrade_run_%TODAY%.log

cd /d "%WORKDIR%"

echo ==================================================== > "%LOGFILE%"
echo Paper-trade daily run (5 systems + DT A/B) — %DATE% %TIME% >> "%LOGFILE%"
echo ==================================================== >> "%LOGFILE%"

echo [0a] pull_us_market.py  (refresh US VIX/SPX -^> us_market_history.csv, Pillar B) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pull_us_market.py                                              >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [0a2] rebuild_state_from_ticker.bat  (self-update v3.4b+DT4 state from BQ ticker, local only) >> "%LOGFILE%"
call rebuild_state_from_ticker.bat                                    >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [0/6] refresh_lagged_caches.py  (extend px/ov/surprise/events to latest BQ) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python refresh_lagged_caches.py                                       >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [0b] snapshot_state_vintage.py  (accumulate point-in-time state vintage) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python snapshot_state_vintage.py                                      >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [0c] macro_healthcheck.py  (DT5G feed health + fail-safe gate -^> data\macro_health.json) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python macro_healthcheck.py                                           >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

=== telegram send helpers ===
./8l_package/cheap_pb_floor.py
./8l_package/pt_8l_quarterly.py
./8l_package/rank_8l_daily_alert.py
./8l_package/telegram_8l_bot.py
./8l_package/telegram_recommend.py
./cheap_pb_floor.py
./deploy_golive_dt5g_v4/_build_zips.py
./dna_report.py
./layer3_v4_shadow.py
./macro_healthcheck.py

content.text: There's a clean `send_telegram_text` helper. Let me create a small daily-push script that fires only when the signal is live, and wire it into the batch.

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
crisis_alert_push.py — daily Telegram push for the DT5G x 8L capitulation signal.
Pushes ONLY on a live WATCH/STRONG signal (build_market_alert returns None when
DORMANT), so it's silent on normal days. Wire into papertrade_daily.bat.
"""
import os, sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
from dna_report import build_market_alert

msg = build_market_alert()
if not msg:
    print("capitulation: DORMANT — no push."); sys.exit(0)
print(msg)
try:
    from telegram_recommend import send_telegram_text, load_config
    cfg = load_config()
    ok = send_telegram_text(cfg["bot_token"], cfg["chat_id"], msg).get("ok")
    print("telegram push ok:", ok)
except Exception as e:
    print("telegram push skipped:", e)

REM
REM Updated 2026-05-27:

REM    V12        = Am Duong (BAL+LAGGED) + TQ34b
REM    V121_ENS   = V12.1 + Ensemble (M1+M3r AND-HOLD) + TQ34b + BASE

setlocal
set WORKDIR=/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude

---
name: dt5g-8l-crisis-capitulation-2026
description: DT5G CRISIS + cross-sectional panic washout = WHEN to buy; 8L quality+golden = WHAT — validated +16% med/83% win 60d
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: abab64cf-3a58-4fd5-b8cd-69bd624984e6
---

**Research [REDACTED]04**: combine DT5G regime (WHEN, macro) + within-crisis panic washout (WHEN, micro/capitulation) + 8L quality/cheapness (WHAT). Point-in-time backtest on `ticker_prune`, 2014+, clean LEAD-based forward 60d returns (NOT the corrupted `profit_*` cols — those have impossible −300% means, don't use).

**Core finding — CRISIS is the regime where quality earns its biggest edge.** Forward 60d by DT5G state × quality (ROE_Min5Y≥12% & ROIC5Y≥10% & FSCORE≥6):
- **CRISIS(1)**: Q med +0.35%/win 52% vs junk med −2.24%/win 44% (Q is the ONLY thing that works)
- BEAR(2): junk bounces, Q lags. NEUTRAL(3)/BULL(4): beta/junk wins (risk-on). EX-BULL(5): Q defends as top rolls over (Q +2.6% vs junk −0.4%).

**The user's hypothesis CONFIRMED — peak panic = nearest reversal.** Within CRISIS, forward 60d return rises MONOTONICALLY with cross-sectional panic intensity (oversold breadth = % of prune universe with D_RSI<0.30):
- low panic (0–1.5%): Q med −0.43%/win 49%, junk med −5.18%/win 38%
- mid (1.5–5.6%): Q −0.07%/50%, junk −2.96%/42%
- **high panic (≥5.7%, top tercile)**: Q med **+3.76%/win 58%**, junk +1.02%/53%
→ Just "we're in CRISIS" is NOT enough; the capitulation timing roughly 10×s the median. CRISIS dispersion(2.41)/oversold(8.2%)/abs-move(2.08%) all highest = the "đồng pha" panic signature.

**Best cell — stack the golden cheapness layer** (pb_z=(PB−PB_MA5Y)/PB_SD5Y, [[cheap-pb-floor-quality-crisis-2026]]'s GOLDEN). High-panic CRISIS × quality × pb_z<−1: **+17.7% mean / +16.1% MEDIAN / 83% win** (n=188). Cheapness drives MAGNITUDE (junk-golden +18.9% mean too), quality drives RELIABILITY (83% vs 74% win) and protects the not-cheap bucket (Q pb_z≥0 +4.3% vs junk pb_z≥0 −1.1%). DT5G-CRISIS-panic is exactly the "chờ panic" trigger the rare golden signal [REDACTED] needed.

**Robustness (per-episode, Q×high-panic):** wins 2014/2019/2020(+26%!)/2023/2024; weak 2016 (shallow false-positive crisis, [[crisis-release-overlay-2026]]) & 2022 (112d grinding crisis, 60d too short, bottom was Nov). → fire on GENUINE sharp capitulations, be wary of prolonged/shallow ones; size up as washout deepens.

**Addendum [REDACTED]04 — decline SPEED → time-to-bottom** (`analyze_decline_speed_bottom.py`, EW prune index, 12 drawdown episodes ≥8% + 25 de-clustered fast-down events; "fast" = trailing-10d EW ret ≤−7.7% & pct_down≥60%):
- **Panic-breadth peak ≈ price bottom** (coincident): oversold-breadth peak lands within **0–7d (median ~1d)** of the EW trough across crisis troughs. When oversold stops making new highs from an extreme, the bottom is essentially in.
- **Fast signal → bottom soon**: days-to-bottom mean 23d / **median 8d** (p25=1,p75=41); further drop median −4%; fwd60 +5.6%/win 84%. Steep declines bottom faster (median fall 26d vs 59d for slow grinds; corr speed↔duration −0.30, mild).
- **KEY REFINEMENT — speed is NOT enough; need EXTREME washout.** Split the 25 events by oversold≥40%: EXTREME (n=7) → bottom in **median 3d, fwd60 +12% MEDIAN, win 100%** (but a violent final flush, further drop median −12% → scale in, don't expect the exact tick); moderate <40% (n=18) → bottom median 11d, +5.3%/78%. The premature 2022-grinding-bear false signals (Jan/Apr/Sep) all had only moderate oversold (~27–30%) and bottomed 40–90d later with −20..−42% more downside.
- **vs DT5G transition (lead/lag):** DT5G is a LATE confirmer — for real crisis troughs it exits CRISIS only **~22–57d (median ~28–30d) AFTER** the EW bottom. The speed+washout signal is present at **83% of bottoms** and is coincident → use washout as the EARLY "crisis ending, start scaling" trigger within CRISIS; DT5G stays the slow structural gate. Complementary, not redundant. Caveat: small n (7 extreme), EW≠portfolio.

**Addendum [REDACTED]04 — exit-rule NAV backtest** (`backtest_crisis_capitulation.py`, tactical cash sleeve, 100% deploy on signal, T+1, 0.3% round-trip, EW quality basket w/ golden fallback; sleeve NAV = compound events, cash between):
- **STRONG entry (oversold≥40%, 12 episodes) is the precision entry; WATCH (crisis&≥5.7%, 11 ep) is too EARLY** (catches crisis onset → more downside): WATCH FIX40 med −3.3%/win 18%/sleeve x0.85 (loses), only works at ≥120d (x1.63). Use WATCH as "start scaling, expect pain", STRONG as the real buy.
- **STRONG exit-rule results** (med ret / win / sleeve-mult over 2014-26): FIX40 +9.7%/83%/x2.28 · **FIX60 +17.6%/75%/x4.49** · FIX120 +15.2%/67%/x6.34 · FIX252 +15.2%/67%/**x12.22** · REGIME_BULL x4.95 (DT5G too slow to confirm BULL) · **VAL_pbz≥0 REJECT** (exits in 1 day median — cheapness normalizes on the bounce; pb_z is an ENTRY signal not exit) · **TRAIL15 (15% trailing, cap 1Y) x8.57** = best balance (lets 2020 +87%/2023 +93% run, cuts 2022 grind losers).
- **VERDICT on "giữ đến khi nào":** for STRONG entry — clean rule = **hold ~60 trading days** (consistency, win 75%, alpha +6.4pp); max-compounding = **15% trailing stop capped ~1Y** (x8.57). Avoid valuation-exit & regime-exit. 2022 grinding bear fired 3 STRONG entries, 2 lost at short horizon but recovered by FIX252 → in prolonged bears, short holds whipsaw, scale in + trail.
- Framing: this is a **dry-powder deployment sleeve** (only ~12 deploys/12y, ~15% time invested), not a full portfolio — turns reserve cash into x8–12 over the period. Latest STRONG fire = 2026-03-09 (recent, forward path censored).

**Addendum [REDACTED]04 — INTEGRATION into core V4/V5 (idle-crisis-cash overlay)** (`integrated_capitulation_overlay.py`): user design = core parks cash in DT5G CRISIS → redeploy that idle cash into the capitulation basket on STRONG signal, hold 60d, return to core. Splices actual basket daily path into parked windows.
- **Only 4 of 12 STRONG events fire while DT5G==CRISIS** (core parked): 2014-05-08, 2018-05-28, 2022-04-20, 2023-10-31. On those windows core V4 ≈ flat (x1.03) vs basket x1.68. **The best washouts (2020 COVID +32%, 2025 tariff) fire OUTSIDE crisis** (core invested, no idle cash — but core rides them anyway). Don't force-fund non-crisis washouts by selling core (fights the core signal).
- **Overlay result (full 2014-26): V4 20.45%→25.24% CAGR (+4.78pp), V5 23.67%→28.22% (+4.55pp), MaxDD UNCHANGED (−21.8%/−20.2%), Sharpe ↑ (1.43→1.54, 1.49→1.59).** MaxDD flat because overlay deploys AFTER the washout into the RECOVERY, not deepening the drawdown = nearly-free return. CAVEAT: assumes ~100% redeploy in crisis (real parked frac ~70% per cash_etf{3:0.7} → realistic ~+3pp); magnitude front-loaded by the 2014 event (few events → indicative not precise).
- **Scale-in (rải lệnh) — data REJECTS spreading entry**: all-in at STRONG≥40% = mean60 14.9%/med 16.0% vs 3-tranche 13.7% / 5-tranche 13.3% (win 75% all). Because oversold≥40% ALREADY marks the bottom (~3d away) → averaging over following days just buys the bounce higher. Verdict: go (near) all-in at STRONG; if scaling for comfort keep tight (2-3 tranches/~3d). The right place to "scale" is WATCH(first small)→STRONG(bulk), NOT after ≥40%.
- **VERDICT: deploy the design** — overlay idle crisis cash, all-in at STRONG≥40%, hold 60d, return to core. Free Sharpe/CAGR, zero extra MaxDD.

**Deployable:** `crisis_capitulation_signal.py` — fully causal LIVE trigger. Gate1 DT5G state==CRISIS, Gate2 oversold breadth≥0.057, then rank 8L quality+golden+oversold candidates (liq≥2B, redflag-excl). Dormant outside crisis (prints WAIT). Tested [REDACTED]03 = NEUTRAL → correctly dormant (live snap: 764 names, 42 quality, 121 golden, 6 q+golden, but macro gate closed so no action). Output: data/crisis_capitulation_signal.{md,csv}. 9 DT5G crisis episodes 2014–2024 (46–112d each). DT5G crisis live table `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live` state 1=CRISIS.

aiTitle: Research DT5G and 8L for optimal entry points

content.text:
Cả (d) và (e) đã xong và test sạch. Tóm tắt:

## (e) Overlay "thực tế" — đọc đúng tỷ trọng cash bằng beta

Thay vì giả định bơm 100% NAV lúc crisis, tôi đo **độ tham gia cổ phiếu thực tế của core trong mỗi cửa sổ = beta của core với thị trường**, nên phần cash rảnh = `1 − beta`. Đây là cách đọc thẳng exposure từ chính cách NAV dao động (không phải mổ engine).

Tỷ lệ cash rảnh đo được ở 4 cửa sổ deploy:

| Sự kiện | beta core→mkt | cash rảnh (1−beta) |
|---|---|---|
| 2014-05 | 0.05 | **0.95** (gần như full cash) |
| 2018-05 | 0.57 | 0.43 |
| 2022-04 | 0.35 | 0.65 |
| 2023-10 | 0.29 | 0.71 |

**Kết quả thực tế** (so với +4.6pp lý tưởng trước đó):

| | CAGR | +pp | MaxDD | Sharpe |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| V4 baseline | 20.45% | — | −21.8% | 1.43 |
| **V4 + overlay thực tế** | **23.99%** | **+3.54** | −21.8% (y nguyên) | 1.55 |
| V5 baseline | 23.67% | — | −20.2% | 1.49 |
| **V5 + overlay thực tế** | **26.49%** | **+2.82** | −20.2% (y nguyên) | 1.57 |

→ Con số trung thực đáng tin: **~+3pp CAGR, MaxDD không đổi, Sharpe +0.1** (rule-of-thumb f=0.7 cho ra +3.2–3.4pp, khớp). Đúng như dự đoán, +4.6pp lý tưởng bị thổi vì giả định 100% — nhưng ngay cả bản thực tế vẫn là cải thiện gần-như-miễn-phí về rủi ro.

## (d) Đã wire cảnh báo vào bot Telegram

Thêm vào `dna_report.py`:
- `get_capitulation()` — đọc DT5G state + oversold breadth live → DORMANT / WATCH / STRONG (cache 5 phút).
- **Dòng "Panic"** trong block NOW của mỗi mã (hiện 🔴 WASHOUT CỰC ĐOAN hoặc 🟢 CRISIS panic khi có).
- `build_market_alert()` — tin nhắn cấp thị trường, **trả None khi dormant** (không spam ngày thường).

Script đẩy `crisis_alert_push.py` (dùng helper `telegram_recommend.send_telegram_text`) → đã cắm vào `papertrade_daily.bat` bước [8]. Chỉ ping khi WATCH/STRONG. Test hôm nay = DORMANT → im lặng đúng như mong đợi. Mẫu tin khi STRONG bắn:

```
🧭 TÍN HIỆU MUA-KHI-SỢ (DT5G×8L)
🔴🔴 WASHOUT CỰC ĐOAN — oversold 46% (>= 40%)
Đáy cách ~3 phiên (median) · fwd60 +12%/100% win.
→ BƠM cash dự trữ vào rổ 8L quality+golden, (gần) ALL-IN, giữ ~60 phiên...
```

---

**Toàn bộ research stream này giờ đã khép kín:** phát hiện (DT5G CRISIS × panic × 8L) → tín hiệu live 2 mức (`crisis_capitulation_signal.py`) → quy tắc giữ 60 ngày (backtest) → tích hợp vào core V4/V5 (+~3pp, free DD) → cảnh báo tự động qua bot. Memory đã cập nhật đầy đủ.

Files mới/sửa: `integrated_overlay_realistic.py`, `crisis_alert_push.py`, `dna_report.py` (+3 hàm), `papertrade_daily.bat` (bước 8), `crisis_capitulation_signal.py` (2 mức).

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""washout_master_table.py — every market washout (oversold breadth >=40%) since 2014,
with DT5G state + days-to-bottom + basket forward returns. Answers: is a washout a
good buy even when DT5G is NOT crisis?"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import os, sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
W=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
STN={1:"CRISIS",2:"BEAR",3:"NEUTRAL",4:"BULL",5:"EX-BULL"}

D=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","daily_comovement_dt5g.csv"),parse_dates=["time"]).sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True)
D["ew"]=(1+D["avg_ret"]).cumprod()
bt=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","bt_capitulation_STRONG.csv"),parse_dates=["date"]).set_index("date")

# de-cluster washout days (>=40% oversold), 30d gap = one episode; record PEAK oversold in cluster
ws=D[D["pct_oversold"]>=0.40].copy().sort_values("time")
ws["g"]=ws["time"].diff().dt.days.fillna(999); ws["c"]=(ws["g"]>=30).cumsum()
rows=[]
ewv=D["ew"].values; tv=D["time"].values
for _,grp in ws.groupby("c"):
    d0=grp.iloc[0]["time"]; peak_os=grp["pct_oversold"].max(); ndays=len(grp)
    i0=D.index[D["time"]==d0][0]; st=int(D["state"].iloc[i0])
    # days from signal to EW bottom within next 90 trading days
    H=min(90,len(D)-1-i0); seg=ewv[i0:i0+H+1]
    tmin=int(np.argmin(seg)); further=seg[tmin]/seg[0]-1
    r=bt.loc[d0] if d0 in bt.index else None
    rows.append(dict(
        date=d0.date(), state=st, regime=STN[st], peak_oversold=round(peak_os*100),
        ws_days=ndays, days_to_bottom=tmin, further_drop=round(further*100,1),
        basket60=r["FIX60_ret"] if r is not None else np.nan,
        basket120=r["FIX120_ret"] if r is not None else np.nan,
        tier=r["tier"] if r is not None else "?"))
M=pd.DataFrame(rows)
# repeat-washout flag = another washout within 90 trading days after (grinding bear)
M["rep_after"]=False
for i in range(len(M)-1):
    di=D.index[D["time"]==pd.Timestamp(M.loc[i,"date"])][0]
    dj=D.index[D["time"]==pd.Timestamp(M.loc[i+1,"date"])][0]
    if dj-di<=90: M.loc[i,"rep_after"]=True
M["type"]=np.where(M["rep_after"],"GRIND(repeat)","SHARP(isolated)")

print("="*104)
print("ALL MARKET WASHOUTS (oversold breadth >= 40%), 2014-2026   [basket = 8L quality+golden, 0.3% cost]")
print("="*104)
show=M.copy()
print(show[["date","regime","peak_oversold","ws_days","days_to_bottom","further_drop","basket60","basket120","tier","type"]].to_string(index=False))

def stat(df,lbl):
    b=df["basket60"].dropna()
    print(f"  {lbl:<26} n={len(df):2d} | basket60 mean {b.mean():5.1f}% / median {b.median():5.1f}% / win {100*(b>0).mean():3.0f}%")

print("\n"+"-"*70)
print("SPLIT BY DT5G STATE AT THE WASHOUT:")
stat(M[M.state==1],"CRISIS (state 1)")
stat(M[M.state!=1],"NOT crisis (state 2-5)")
stat(M[M.state==2],"  - BEAR (2)")
stat(M[M.state.isin([3])],"  - NEUTRAL (3)")
stat(M[M.state.isin([4,5])],"  - BULL/EX-BULL (4-5)")
print("\nSPLIT BY SHAPE (does the washout repeat within 90d = grinding bear?):")
stat(M[M["type"].str.startswith("SHARP")],"SHARP / isolated")
stat(M[M["type"].str.startswith("GRIND")],"GRIND / repeated")
M.to_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","washout_master_table.csv"),index=False)
print("\nSaved: data/washout_master_table.csv")

content.text:
Bảng đã xong. Đây là **toàn bộ các lần washout (oversold ≥40%) từ 2014**, kèm trạng thái DT5G và lợi nhuận thực tế của rổ 8L (giữ 60 ngày, đã trừ phí):

| Ngày | Regime DT5G | Oversold đỉnh | Ngày tới đáy | Rơi thêm | Rổ 60d | Rổ 120d | Dạng |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 2014-05-08 | 🔴 CRISIS | 62% | 3 | −7.0% | **+34.7%** | +39.8% | sharp |
| 2015-08-24 | 🟡 NEUTRAL | 45% | 1 | −0.2% | +18.4% | +15.8% | grind |
| 2016-01-18 | 🟡 NEUTRAL | 43% | 0 | 0% | +17.0% | +39.0% | sharp |
| 2018-05-28 | 🔴 CRISIS | 41% | 32 | −4.7% | +19.6% | +36.9% | sharp |
| 2020-03-12 | 🟠 BEAR | 60% | 13 | −14.4% | **+31.9%** | +43.5% | sharp |
| 2022-04-20 | 🔴 CRISIS | 62% | 42 | −26.8% | **−7.2%** | −5.8% | grind |
| 2022-06-20 | 🟠 BEAR | 46% | 90 | −20.2% | +27.7% | −2.0% | grind |
| 2022-09-29 | 🟠 BEAR | 77% | 33 | −37.7% | **−11.3%** | −11.5% | sharp* |
| 2023-10-31 | 🔴 CRISIS | 44% | 0 | 0% | +12.5% | +41.5% | sharp |
| 2024-04-19 | 🟢 BULL | 41% | 0 | 0% | +18.2% | +14.6% | sharp |
| 2025-04-03 | 🟢 BULL | 84% | 3 | −14.2% | +10.5% | +9.5% | sharp |
| 2026-03-09 | 🟡 NEUTRAL | 44% | 10 | −1.5% | −1.2%* | −1.2%* | sharp |

(*2026-03-09 mới gần đây, đường giá forward bị cắt cụt — số chưa đủ.)

## Trả lời thẳng: KHÔNG-crisis vẫn là cơ hội mua tốt như nhau

| Nhóm | n | Rổ 60d (mean / median / win) |
|---|---|---|
| **CRISIS (state 1)** | 4 | +14.9% / +16.1% / **75%** |
| **KHÔNG crisis (2–5)** | 8 | +13.9% / +17.6% / **75%** |
| — BEAR (2) | 3 | +16.1% / +27.7% / 67% |
| — NEUTRAL (3) | 3 | +11.4% / +17.0% / 67% |
| — BULL/EX-BULL (4–5) | 2 | +14.3% / +14.3% / **100%** |

→ **Gần như giống hệt nhau** (+14.9% vs +13.9%, win 75% cả hai). Edge của washout **độc lập với trạng thái DT5G**. Thậm chí washout trong BULL (cú chỉnh mạnh giữa uptrend như tariff-crash 2025, 2024-04) thắng **100%** — "mua khi sợ" giữa thị trường tăng là tín hiệu sạch nhất. Các cú đẹp nhất (2014 +35%, 2020 COVID +32%) lại nằm ở CRISIS và BEAR.

## Nhưng mối nguy thật KHÔNG phải state — mà là GẤU GRIND

Cả **3/12 lần thua đều ở năm 2022** (2022-04 −7%, 2022-09 −11%, và 2022-06 nảy rồi đổ lại −2% ở 120d). Nhìn cột **"rơi thêm"**: ở 2022 thị trường còn rơi tiếp **−20% đến −38%** *sau* washout — washout đầu tiên KHÔNG phải đáy. Còn các cú sharp đơn lẻ (2016, 2023, 2024) rơi thêm 0% → washout chính là đáy.

→ Bài học: nguy hiểm là khi washout **lặp lại liên tục trong một con gấu kéo dài** (2022 bắn 3 lần trong 6 tháng, mỗi lần lại thủng đáy mới). Một washout **đơn lẻ** (kể cả trong NEUTRAL/BULL) thì đáng tin gần đáy.

## Hệ quả cho danh mục của bạn

1. **Crisis washout** → dùng cash rảnh của core (miễn phí, như overlay đã test, +~3pp).
2. **Non-crisi washout** → core V4/V5 đang full đầu tư nên **không có cash rảnh**; nó tự ăn nhịp hồi (đang invested). Muốn ăn thêm thì cần **đạn dự trữ riêng** — nhưng giữ reserve thường trực sẽ tốn cơ hội trong bull. Khuyến nghị: giữ overlay cho crisis (free), thêm reserve nhỏ ~10–15% cho các washout cực đoan; **đừng** ôm reserve lớn thường trực chỉ để chờ.
3. **Trong gấu grind (washout lặp)**: đừng all-in cú đầu — **rải lệnh qua các washout cách nhau >30 ngày** để bắt được đáy cuối (Nov-2022), thay vì cháy túi ở cú đầu.

Files: `washout_master_table.py`, `data/washout_master_table.csv`.

Bạn có muốn tôi thêm một **bộ lọc "gấu grind"** vào tín hiệu STRONG không? Ví dụ: nếu washout này là cú lặp (đã có washout khác trong 90 ngày trước) hoặc breadth vẫn đang xấu đi đều, thì hạ cảnh báo xuống "rải lệnh thận trọng" thay vì "all-in" — để tránh đúng cái bẫy 2022.

content: okie, thêm bộ lọc gấu grind vào tín hiệu STRONG. ngoài ra nếu không phải trạng thái crisis, và không phải bull hoặc ex-bull thì chúng ta vẫn có cash dự trữ theo tỉ lệ phân bổ của trạng thái thị trường. trong trường hợp này, nên chăng dùng hết tiền trong dịp này và chờ 60 ngày để reset về trạng thái bình thường

content.text:
Hai ý tưởng đều hay — đặc biệt điểm thứ hai rất sắc: **reserve cash đã có sẵn theo tỉ trọng phân bổ của state** (CRISIS→100% reserve, BEAR→80%, NEUTRAL→30%, BULL/EX-BULL→0%), nên không cần giữ reserve riêng. Hãy để tôi (1) backtest việc mở rộng deploy reserve theo state + bộ lọc grind, rồi (2) wire bộ lọc grind vào tín hiệu live.

Trước hết, backtest để xác thực bằng số:

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
extended_overlay_grind.py\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Extends the capitulation overlay beyond CRISIS: deploy the STATE-PRESCRIBED cash
reserve (f = 1 - state_weight) into the washout basket on every washout, hold 60d,
reset. State weights: CRISIS 0% -> f=1.0, BEAR 20% -> f=0.8, NEUTRAL 70% -> f=0.3,
BULL/EX-BULL -> f=0 (no reserve, skip).

Overlay return model (idle reserve was earning ~0):  new_ret = core_ret + f*basket_ret
(slight upper bound if the core re-risks its own reserve within the 60d window).

GRIND filter: a washout that REPEATS within 90 trading days of a prior one = grinding
bear (2022 trap, market keeps making lower lows). Variants:
  ALL-FULL    : deploy full f on every washout
  GRIND-HALF  : full f on SHARP, f/2 on GRIND (cautious scale-in)
  GRIND-SKIP  : full f on SHARP, 0 on GRIND
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import os, sys, io, subprocess
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
W=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"; SDK_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin"
COST=0.003; H=60
F_STATE={1:1.0, 2:0.8, 3:0.3, 4:0.0, 5:0.0}   # reserve = 1 - state target weight
def bq(sql):
    env=dict(os.environ); env["PATH"]=env.get("PATH","")+os.pathsep+SDK_BIN
    env.setdefault("CLOUDSDK_PYTHON",SDK_BIN+r"\..\platform\bundledpython\python.exe")
    o=subprocess.run([SDK_BIN+r"\bq.cmd","query","--use_legacy_sql=false",f"--project_id={PROJECT}",
        "--format=csv","--max_rows=200000"," ".join(sql.split())],capture_output=True,text=True,env=env)
    if o.returncode!=0: raise RuntimeError(o.stdout+o.stderr)
    return pd.read_csv(io.StringIO(o.stdout))

core=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","5sys_prodspec_201401_202605_dt5g.csv"),parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")
D=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","daily_comovement_dt5g.csv"),parse_dates=["time"]).sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True)
state_by=D.set_index("time")["state"]
ws=D[D["pct_oversold"]>=0.40].copy().sort_values("time")
ws["g"]=ws["time"].diff().dt.days.fillna(999); ws["c"]=(ws["g"]>=30).cumsum()
ev=[]
for _,grp in ws.groupby("c"):
    d0=grp.iloc[0]["time"]; st=int(state_by.get(d0,3)); ev.append((d0,st))
# grind flag: another washout within 90 trading days BEFORE this one
ev=sorted(ev); evdates=[e[0] for e in ev]
def tdgap(a,b):
    ia=D.index[D["time"]==a][0]; ib=D.index[D["time"]==b][0]; return ia-ib
events=[]
for i,(d0,st) in enumerate(ev):
    grind = i>0 and tdgap(d0,ev[i-1][0])<=90
    events.append(dict(date=d0,state=st,f=F_STATE.get(st,0),grind=grind))
E=pd.DataFrame(events)
print("washout events + state reserve + grind flag:")
print(E.assign(date=E.date.dt.date).to_string(index=False))

# basket daily NAV cache (all deploy events f>0)
cache=os.path.join(W,"data","_washout_baskets.csv")
deploy=[e for e in events if e["f"]>0]
if os.path.exists(cache):
    B=pd.read_csv(cache,parse_dates=["time"])
else:
    frames=[]
    for e in deploy:
        ds=str(e["date"].date())
        q=bq(f"""WITH elig AS (SELECT p.ticker, SAFE_DIVIDE(p.PB-p.PB_MA5Y,p.PB_SD5Y) pbz0 FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune p
          WHERE p.time=DATE '{ds}' AND p.ROE_Min5Y>=0.12 AND p.ROIC5Y>=0.10 AND p.FSCORE>=6
            AND COALESCE(p.Price,p.Close)*p.Volume/1e9>=2)
          SELECT f.time,f.ticker,f.Close,e.pbz0 FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune f JOIN elig e USING(ticker)
          WHERE f.time>=DATE '{ds}' AND f.time<=DATE_ADD(DATE '{ds}',INTERVAL 130 DAY) ORDER BY f.ticker,f.time""")
        q["time"]=pd.to_datetime(q["time"]); pbz0=q.groupby("ticker")["pbz0"].first()
        g=pbz0[pbz0<-1].index.tolist(); c=pbz0[pbz0<0].index.tolist(); a=pbz0.index.tolist()
        names=g if len(g)>=3 else (c if len(c)>=3 else a)
        px=q[q.ticker.isin(names)].pivot(index="time",columns="ticker",values="Close").sort_index().ffill().iloc[:H+1]
        nav=px.div(px.iloc[0]).mean(axis=1); nav=nav/nav.iloc[0]
        frames.append(pd.DataFrame({"event":ds,"time":nav.index,"nav":nav.values}))
    B=pd.concat(frames); B.to_csv(cache,index=False)

idx=core.index
def overlay(col,mode):
    base=core[col]; ret=base.pct_change().fillna(0).values.copy()
    for e in deploy:
        f=e["f"]
        if mode=="half" and e["grind"]: f*=0.5
        if mode=="skip" and e["grind"]: f=0.0
        if f<=0: continue
        ds=str(e["date"].date()); bk=B[B["event"]==ds].set_index("time")["nav"]
        if len(bk)<5: continue
        i0=idx.searchsorted(e["date"]); bret=bk.pct_change().fillna(0).values
        n=min(H,len(bret)-1,len(idx)-1-i0)
        ret[i0+1:i0+1+n]+=f*bret[1:1+n]     # add basket return on the idle reserve f
        ret[i0+1]-=COST*f; ret[i0+n]-=COST*f
    return pd.Series(np.cumprod(1+ret),index=idx)
def metrics(nav):
    nav=nav.dropna(); r=nav.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(nav.index[-1]-nav.index[0]).days/365.25
    return (nav.iloc[-1]**(1/yrs)-1)*100,(nav/nav.cummax()-1).min()*100,r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)

print("\n"+"="*78)
print("Extended overlay (deploy state reserve on EVERY washout, hold 60d)")
print("="*78)
for sysname,col in [("V4","V4_V121_ENS_TQ34b"),("V5","V5_V4_KellyQ2")]:
    cb,db,sb=metrics(core[col])
    print(f"{sysname} baseline           : CAGR {cb:5.2f}%  MaxDD {db:6.1f}%  Sharpe {sb:.2f}")
    for tag,mode in [("ALL-FULL (no grind filt)","all"),("GRIND-HALF","half"),("GRIND-SKIP","skip")]:
        nav=overlay(col,mode); cn,dn,sn=metrics(nav)
        print(f"{sysname} +overlay {tag:<24}: CAGR {cn:5.2f}%  MaxDD {dn:6.1f}%  Sharpe {sn:.2f}   ({cn-cb:+.2f}pp)")
    print()

file.content:
STATE_NAME = {1: "CRISIS", 2: "BEAR", 3: "NEUTRAL", 4: "BULL", 5: "EX-BULL"}

# ---- 1. live regime + panic breadth -----------------------------------------
live = bq("""
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT p.time,
    AVG(CASE WHEN p.D_RSI<0.3 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) oversold,
    AVG(CASE WHEN p.MA200>0 AND p.Close>=p.MA200 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) above_ma200,
    AVG(SAFE_DIVIDE(p.Close,p.Close_T1)-1) avg_ret
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune p WHERE p.Close_T1>0 GROUP BY p.time )
SELECT d.time, s.state, d.oversold, d.above_ma200, d.avg_ret
FROM daily d JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live s USING(time)
ORDER BY d.time DESC LIMIT 1
""").iloc[0]

asof   = live["time"]
state  = int(live["state"])
oversold = float(live["oversold"])

# two-level trigger
if oversold >= WASHOUT_EXTREME:
    level = "STRONG_BUY"
elif state == 1 and oversold >= PANIC_THRESHOLD:
    level = "WATCH"
else:
    level = "DORMANT"

LVL_TXT = {
    "STRONG_BUY": "🔴 STRONG BUY — EXTREME washout: bottom ~3 sessions away (median), "
                  "fwd60 +12%/100% win. SCALE IN through the final flush (~-12% more).",
    "WATCH":      "🟢 WATCH — CRISIS panic window open: quality+golden edge active "
                  "(fwd60 +16% med/83% win at golden). Begin building; add if washout deepens to 40%.",
    "DORMANT":    "⚪ DORMANT — gate closed (no genuine capitulation).",
}
crisis_note = "DT5G confirms CRISIS" if state == 1 else f"DT5G={STATE_NAME.get(state)} (washout edge is state-independent)"

hdr = (f"# DT5G x 8L Crisis-Capitulation Signal  ({asof})\n\n"
       f"- DT5G state: **{state} = {STATE_NAME.get(state,'?')}**\n"
       f"- Panic washout (oversold breadth, % prune D_RSI<0.30): "
       f"**{oversold*100:.1f}%**  (WATCH >= {PANIC_THRESHOLD*100:.1f}%, STRONG >= {WASHOUT_EXTREME*100:.0f}%)\n"
       f"- % above MA200: {float(live['above_ma200'])*100:.1f}%\n"
       f"- **SIGNAL: {LVL_TXT[level]}**  ({crisis_note})\n")

print(hdr)

if level == "DORMANT":
    why = "not in CRISIS" if state != 1 else f"in CRISIS but panic below WATCH threshold ({oversold*100:.1f}% < {PANIC_THRESHOLD*100:.1f}%)"
    msg = hdr + f"\nDormant — {why}. This trigger only acts on genuine capitulations.\n"
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data", "crisis_capitulation_signal.md"), "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:

toolUseResult.originalFile:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
crisis_capitulation_signal.py — DT5G CRISIS x 8L capitulation buy trigger\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Research result ([REDACTED]04, full 2014+ point-in-time backtest on ticker_prune):

  WHEN to buy is a TWO-stage gate, WHAT to buy is the 8L quality/cheapness lens.

  Stage 1 (macro)  : DT5G state == CRISIS  (tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live)
  Stage 2 (micro)  : cross-sectional PANIC washout — oversold breadth
                     (% of prune universe with D_RSI < 0.30) in the TOP tercile
                     of crisis days, i.e. >= ~5.7%. Forward 60d return rises
                     MONOTONICALLY with panic intensity inside CRISIS:
                        low panic   quality med -0.4% / win 49%
                        high panic  quality med +3.8% / win 58%
  Selection (8L)   : quality (ROE_Min5Y>=12% & ROIC5Y>=10% & FSCORE>=6) AND
                     cheap-vs-own-history pb_z = (PB-PB_MA5Y)/PB_SD5Y < -1 ("golden")
                        high-panic CRISIS x quality x golden:
                        +17.7% mean / +16.1% MEDIAN / 83% win over 60 trading days
                     Cheapness drives magnitude; quality drives reliability/win-rate
                     and protects the not-cheap bucket.

  Robustness: positive in 2014/2019/2020(+26%)/2023/2024; weak in 2016 (shallow
  false-positive crisis) and 2022 (112d grinding crisis, 60d too short). => fire
  on GENUINE sharp capitulations; size up as the washout deepens.

This script is a LIVE TRIGGER. It is dormant (prints WAIT) outside CRISIS, which
is the common case. No look-ahead: state, breadth, pb_z and quality are all
point-in-time / causal.

Output: data/crisis_capitulation_signal.{md,csv}  (only a watch line when dormant)
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import os, sys, subprocess, io
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import pandas as pd, numpy as np

WORKDIR = os.environ.get("WORKDIR_8L", r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude")
PROJECT = "[REDACTED]"
SDK_BIN = r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin"
PANIC_THRESHOLD = 0.057   # WATCH: top-tercile oversold breadth on crisis days (2014+ calibration)
WASHOUT_EXTREME = 0.40    # STRONG: extreme breadth washout -> bottom ~3d away, fwd60 +12% med / 100% win
                          # (2014+, n=7; works across states, not only CRISIS -- 2020 COVID was tagged BEAR,
                          #  2025-04 tariff crash was BULL). Expect a violent final flush (~-12%): SCALE IN.

def bq(sql: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    env = dict(os.environ)
    env["PATH"] = env.get("PATH", "") + os.pathsep + SDK_BIN
    env.setdefault("CLOUDSDK_PYTHON",
                   r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\platform\bundledpython\python.exe")
    bqexe = os.path.join(SDK_BIN, "bq.cmd")
    sql1 = " ".join(sql.split())  # collapse newlines: cmd.exe breaks multiline args
    out = subprocess.run([bqexe, "query", "--use_legacy_sql=false",
                          f"--project_id={PROJECT}", "--format=csv", "--max_rows=5000", sql1],
                         capture_output=True, text=True, env=env)
    if out.returncode != 0:
        raise RuntimeError(f"rc={out.returncode}\nSTDERR:\n{out.stderr}\nSTDOUT:\n{out.stdout}")
    return pd.read_csv(io.StringIO(out.stdout))

STATE_NAME = {1: "CRISIS", 2: "BEAR", 3: "NEUTRAL", 4: "BULL", 5: "EX-BULL"}

# ---- 1. live regime + panic breadth -----------------------------------------
live = bq("""
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT p.time,
    AVG(CASE WHEN p.D_RSI<0.3 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) oversold,
    AVG(CASE WHEN p.MA200>0 AND p.Close>=p.MA200 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) above_ma200,
    AVG(SAFE_DIVIDE(p.Close,p.Close_T1)-1) avg_ret
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune p WHERE p.Close_T1>0 GROUP BY p.time )
SELECT d.time, s.state, d.oversold, d.above_ma200, d.avg_ret
FROM daily d JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live s USING(time)
ORDER BY d.time DESC LIMIT 1
""").iloc[0]

asof   = live["time"]
state  = int(live["state"])
oversold = float(live["oversold"])

# two-level trigger
if oversold >= WASHOUT_EXTREME:
    level = "STRONG_BUY"
elif state == 1 and oversold >= PANIC_THRESHOLD:
    level = "WATCH"
else:
    level = "DORMANT"

LVL_TXT = {
    "STRONG_BUY": "🔴 STRONG BUY — EXTREME washout: bottom ~3 sessions away (median), "
                  "fwd60 +12%/100% win. SCALE IN through the final flush (~-12% more).",
    "WATCH":      "🟢 WATCH — CRISIS panic window open: quality+golden edge active "
                  "(fwd60 +16% med/83% win at golden). Begin building; add if washout deepens to 40%.",
    "DORMANT":    "⚪ DORMANT — gate closed (no genuine capitulation).",
}
crisis_note = "DT5G confirms CRISIS" if state == 1 else f"DT5G={STATE_NAME.get(state)} (washout edge is state-independent)"

hdr = (f"# DT5G x 8L Crisis-Capitulation Signal  ({asof})\n\n"
       f"- DT5G state: **{state} = {STATE_NAME.get(state,'?')}**\n"
       f"- Panic washout (oversold breadth, % prune D_RSI<0.30): "
       f"**{oversold*100:.1f}%**  (WATCH >= {PANIC_THRESHOLD*100:.1f}%, STRONG >= {WASHOUT_EXTREME*100:.0f}%)\n"
       f"- % above MA200: {float(live['above_ma200'])*100:.1f}%\n"
       f"- **SIGNAL: {LVL_TXT[level]}**  ({crisis_note})\n")

print(hdr)

if level == "DORMANT":
    why = "not in CRISIS" if state != 1 else f"in CRISIS but panic below WATCH threshold ({oversold*100:.1f}% < {PANIC_THRESHOLD*100:.1f}%)"
    msg = hdr + f"\nDormant — {why}. This trigger only acts on genuine capitulations.\n"
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data", "crisis_capitulation_signal.md"), "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(msg)
    print(f"Dormant ({why}). Nothing to buy. Watch line written.")
    sys.exit(0)

# ---- 2. FIRED: pull live candidate snapshot, score with 8L lens -------------
snap = bq("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(time) mt FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m)
SELECT p.ticker, p.Close, p.D_RSI,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(p.PB-p.PB_MA5Y,p.PB_SD5Y) AS pb_z, p.PB,
  p.ROE_Min5Y, p.ROIC5Y, p.FSCORE,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(p.Close, p.HI_3M_T1)-1 AS dd_3m,
  COALESCE(p.Price,p.Close)*p.Volume/1e9 AS liq_bn
FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m p, latest
WHERE p.time = latest.mt
""")
snap["quality"] = (snap.ROE_Min5Y >= 0.12) & (snap.ROIC5Y >= 0.10) & (snap.FSCORE >= 6)
snap["golden"]  = snap.pb_z < -1
snap["oversold"] = snap.D_RSI < 0.30

# durable 8L rating/route/moat tags (1=AAA .. 5=speculative)
try:
    R = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data", "rating_8l.csv"))[["ticker","route","rating","moat","redflag"]]
    snap = snap.merge(R, on="ticker", how="left")
except Exception:
    snap["rating"] = np.nan; snap["route"] = ""; snap["moat"] = ""; snap["redflag"] = ""

# tiered candidate list (best first): quality+golden+oversold, then quality+golden, then golden
def tier(r):
    if r.quality and r.golden and r.oversold: return 0
    if r.quality and r.golden:                return 1
    if r.quality and r.pb_z < 0 and r.oversold: return 2
    if r.golden:                              return 3
    return 9
snap["tier"] = snap.apply(tier, axis=1)
cand = snap[(snap.tier <= 3) & (snap.liq_bn >= 2) & (snap.redflag.fillna("") == "")].copy()
cand = cand.sort_values(["tier","pb_z"]).reset_index(drop=True)

cols = ["tier","ticker","route","rating","moat","pb_z","PB","dd_3m","D_RSI","ROE_Min5Y","liq_bn"]
view = cand[cols].copy()
view["pb_z"]=view.pb_z.round(2); view["dd_3m"]=(view.dd_3m*100).round(1)
view["ROE_Min5Y"]=(view.ROE_Min5Y*100).round(1); view["liq_bn"]=view.liq_bn.round(1)
view["D_RSI"]=view.D_RSI.round(2); view["PB"]=view.PB.round(2)

tier_lbl={0:"A: quality+golden+oversold",1:"B: quality+golden",2:"C: quality+cheap+oversold",3:"D: golden(any)"}
body = "\n## Ranked capitulation buy candidates\n\nTiers (validated 60d edge, best first): " \
       + "; ".join(f"{k}={v}" for k,v in tier_lbl.items()) + "\n\n" \
       + view.to_markdown(index=False)
with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","crisis_capitulation_signal.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write(hdr+body+"\n")
view.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","crisis_capitulation_signal.csv"),index=False)
print(body)
print(f"\n{len(view)} candidates written to data/crisis_capitulation_signal.csv")

    """Live market capitulation gauge (cached 5 min): DT5G state + cross-sectional
    oversold breadth over the prune universe -> DORMANT / WATCH / STRONG."""
    if _CAPIT_CACHE["val"] is not None and (time.time() - _CAPIT_CACHE["t"]) < 300:
        return _CAPIT_CACHE["val"]
    d = _bq("""WITH daily AS (
        SELECT p.time, AVG(CASE WHEN p.D_RSI<0.3 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) oversold

      SELECT d.time, s.state, d.oversold

STATE_WEIGHT = {1: 0.0, 2: 0.20, 3: 0.70, 4: 1.0, 5: 1.30}   # reserve = 1 - weight


def get_capitulation():
    """Live market capitulation gauge (cached 5 min): DT5G state + oversold breadth ->
    DORMANT / WATCH / STRONG / STRONG_GRIND. STRONG downgrades to STRONG_GRIND when a
    prior washout fired 20-90 sessions ago (grinding bear). Also returns the deployable
    cash reserve = 1 - state target weight."""
    if _CAPIT_CACHE["val"] is not None and (time.time() - _CAPIT_CACHE["t"]) < 300:
        return _CAPIT_CACHE["val"]
    d = _bq("""WITH daily AS (
        SELECT p.time, AVG(CASE WHEN p.D_RSI<0.3 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) oversold
        FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune p WHERE p.Close_T1>0 GROUP BY p.time)
      SELECT d.time, s.state, d.oversold
      FROM daily d JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live s USING(time)
      ORDER BY d.time DESC LIMIT 120""")
    val = None
    if len(d):
        d = d.sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True)
        st = int(d.iloc[-1]["state"]); os_ = float(d.iloc[-1]["oversold"])
        reserve = max(0.0, 1.0 - STATE_WEIGHT.get(st, 0.70))
        prior = d.iloc[:-1]; pw = prior[prior["oversold"] >= STRONG_OVERSOLD]
        grind = False
        if len(pw):
            last_pos = (len(d) - 1) - pw.index.max()
            grind = 20 <= last_pos <= 90
        if os_ >= STRONG_OVERSOLD:               level = "STRONG_GRIND" if grind else "STRONG"
        elif st == 1 and os_ >= WATCH_OVERSOLD:   level = "WATCH"
        else:                                     level = "DORMANT"
        val = {"state": st, "oversold": os_, "level": level, "reserve": reserve,
               "grind": grind, "asof": str(d.iloc[-1]["time"])}
    _CAPIT_CACHE.update(t=time.time(), val=val)
    return val

---
name: dt5g-8l-crisis-capitulation-2026
description: DT5G CRISIS + cross-sectional panic washout = WHEN to buy; 8L quality+golden = WHAT — validated +16% med/83% win 60d
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: abab64cf-3a58-4fd5-b8cd-69bd624984e6
---

**Research [REDACTED]04**: combine DT5G regime (WHEN, macro) + within-crisis panic washout (WHEN, micro/capitulation) + 8L quality/cheapness (WHAT). Point-in-time backtest on `ticker_prune`, 2014+, clean LEAD-based forward 60d returns (NOT the corrupted `profit_*` cols — those have impossible −300% means, don't use).

**Core finding — CRISIS is the regime where quality earns its biggest edge.** Forward 60d by DT5G state × quality (ROE_Min5Y≥12% & ROIC5Y≥10% & FSCORE≥6):
- **CRISIS(1)**: Q med +0.35%/win 52% vs junk med −2.24%/win 44% (Q is the ONLY thing that works)
- BEAR(2): junk bounces, Q lags. NEUTRAL(3)/BULL(4): beta/junk wins (risk-on). EX-BULL(5): Q defends as top rolls over (Q +2.6% vs junk −0.4%).

**The user's hypothesis CONFIRMED — peak panic = nearest reversal.** Within CRISIS, forward 60d return rises MONOTONICALLY with cross-sectional panic intensity (oversold breadth = % of prune universe with D_RSI<0.30):
- low panic (0–1.5%): Q med −0.43%/win 49%, junk med −5.18%/win 38%
- mid (1.5–5.6%): Q −0.07%/50%, junk −2.96%/42%
- **high panic (≥5.7%, top tercile)**: Q med **+3.76%/win 58%**, junk +1.02%/53%
→ Just "we're in CRISIS" is NOT enough; the capitulation timing roughly 10×s the median. CRISIS dispersion(2.41)/oversold(8.2%)/abs-move(2.08%) all highest = the "đồng pha" panic signature.

**Best cell — stack the golden cheapness layer** (pb_z=(PB−PB_MA5Y)/PB_SD5Y, [[cheap-pb-floor-quality-crisis-2026]]'s GOLDEN). High-panic CRISIS × quality × pb_z<−1: **+17.7% mean / +16.1% MEDIAN / 83% win** (n=188). Cheapness drives MAGNITUDE (junk-golden +18.9% mean too), quality drives RELIABILITY (83% vs 74% win) and protects the not-cheap bucket (Q pb_z≥0 +4.3% vs junk pb_z≥0 −1.1%). DT5G-CRISIS-panic is exactly the "chờ panic" trigger the rare golden signal [REDACTED] needed.

**Robustness (per-episode, Q×high-panic):** wins 2014/2019/2020(+26%!)/2023/2024; weak 2016 (shallow false-positive crisis, [[crisis-release-overlay-2026]]) & 2022 (112d grinding crisis, 60d too short, bottom was Nov). → fire on GENUINE sharp capitulations, be wary of prolonged/shallow ones; size up as washout deepens.

**Addendum [REDACTED]04 — decline SPEED → time-to-bottom** (`analyze_decline_speed_bottom.py`, EW prune index, 12 drawdown episodes ≥8% + 25 de-clustered fast-down events; "fast" = trailing-10d EW ret ≤−7.7% & pct_down≥60%):
- **Panic-breadth peak ≈ price bottom** (coincident): oversold-breadth peak lands within **0–7d (median ~1d)** of the EW trough across crisis troughs. When oversold stops making new highs from an extreme, the bottom is essentially in.
- **Fast signal → bottom soon**: days-to-bottom mean 23d / **median 8d** (p25=1,p75=41); further drop median −4%; fwd60 +5.6%/win 84%. Steep declines bottom faster (median fall 26d vs 59d for slow grinds; corr speed↔duration −0.30, mild).
- **KEY REFINEMENT — speed is NOT enough; need EXTREME washout.** Split the 25 events by oversold≥40%: EXTREME (n=7) → bottom in **median 3d, fwd60 +12% MEDIAN, win 100%** (but a violent final flush, further drop median −12% → scale in, don't expect the exact tick); moderate <40% (n=18) → bottom median 11d, +5.3%/78%. The premature 2022-grinding-bear false signals (Jan/Apr/Sep) all had only moderate oversold (~27–30%) and bottomed 40–90d later with −20..−42% more downside.
- **vs DT5G transition (lead/lag):** DT5G is a LATE confirmer — for real crisis troughs it exits CRISIS only **~22–57d (median ~28–30d) AFTER** the EW bottom. The speed+washout signal is present at **83% of bottoms** and is coincident → use washout as the EARLY "crisis ending, start scaling" trigger within CRISIS; DT5G stays the slow structural gate. Complementary, not redundant. Caveat: small n (7 extreme), EW≠portfolio.

**Addendum [REDACTED]04 — exit-rule NAV backtest** (`backtest_crisis_capitulation.py`, tactical cash sleeve, 100% deploy on signal, T+1, 0.3% round-trip, EW quality basket w/ golden fallback; sleeve NAV = compound events, cash between):
- **STRONG entry (oversold≥40%, 12 episodes) is the precision entry; WATCH (crisis&≥5.7%, 11 ep) is too EARLY** (catches crisis onset → more downside): WATCH FIX40 med −3.3%/win 18%/sleeve x0.85 (loses), only works at ≥120d (x1.63). Use WATCH as "start scaling, expect pain", STRONG as the real buy.
- **STRONG exit-rule results** (med ret / win / sleeve-mult over 2014-26): FIX40 +9.7%/83%/x2.28 · **FIX60 +17.6%/75%/x4.49** · FIX120 +15.2%/67%/x6.34 · FIX252 +15.2%/67%/**x12.22** · REGIME_BULL x4.95 (DT5G too slow to confirm BULL) · **VAL_pbz≥0 REJECT** (exits in 1 day median — cheapness normalizes on the bounce; pb_z is an ENTRY signal not exit) · **TRAIL15 (15% trailing, cap 1Y) x8.57** = best balance (lets 2020 +87%/2023 +93% run, cuts 2022 grind losers).
- **VERDICT on "giữ đến khi nào":** for STRONG entry — clean rule = **hold ~60 trading days** (consistency, win 75%, alpha +6.4pp); max-compounding = **15% trailing stop capped ~1Y** (x8.57). Avoid valuation-exit & regime-exit. 2022 grinding bear fired 3 STRONG entries, 2 lost at short horizon but recovered by FIX252 → in prolonged bears, short holds whipsaw, scale in + trail.
- Framing: this is a **dry-powder deployment sleeve** (only ~12 deploys/12y, ~15% time invested), not a full portfolio — turns reserve cash into x8–12 over the period. Latest STRONG fire = 2026-03-09 (recent, forward path censored).

**Addendum [REDACTED]04 — INTEGRATION into core V4/V5 (idle-crisis-cash overlay)** (`integrated_capitulation_overlay.py`): user design = core parks cash in DT5G CRISIS → redeploy that idle cash into the capitulation basket on STRONG signal, hold 60d, return to core. Splices actual basket daily path into parked windows.
- **Only 4 of 12 STRONG events fire while DT5G==CRISIS** (core parked): 2014-05-08, 2018-05-28, 2022-04-20, 2023-10-31. On those windows core V4 ≈ flat (x1.03) vs basket x1.68. **The best washouts (2020 COVID +32%, 2025 tariff) fire OUTSIDE crisis** (core invested, no idle cash — but core rides them anyway). Don't force-fund non-crisis washouts by selling core (fights the core signal).
- **Overlay result (full 2014-26): V4 20.45%→25.24% CAGR (+4.78pp), V5 23.67%→28.22% (+4.55pp), MaxDD UNCHANGED (−21.8%/−20.2%), Sharpe ↑ (1.43→1.54, 1.49→1.59).** MaxDD flat because overlay deploys AFTER the washout into the RECOVERY, not deepening the drawdown = nearly-free return. CAVEAT: assumes ~100% redeploy in crisis (real parked frac ~70% per cash_etf{3:0.7} → realistic ~+3pp); magnitude front-loaded by the 2014 event (few events → indicative not precise).
- **Scale-in (rải lệnh) — data REJECTS spreading entry**: all-in at STRONG≥40% = mean60 14.9%/med 16.0% vs 3-tranche 13.7% / 5-tranche 13.3% (win 75% all). Because oversold≥40% ALREADY marks the bottom (~3d away) → averaging over following days just buys the bounce higher. Verdict: go (near) all-in at STRONG; if scaling for comfort keep tight (2-3 tranches/~3d). The right place to "scale" is WATCH(first small)→STRONG(bulk), NOT after ≥40%.
- **VERDICT: deploy the design** — overlay idle crisis cash, all-in at STRONG≥40%, hold 60d, return to core. Free Sharpe/CAGR, zero extra MaxDD.
- **REALISTIC overlay (e), `integrated_overlay_realistic.py`**: idle-cash frac = 1−beta(core→mkt) per window (beta = realized equity exposure, read from NAV co-movement; no engine surgery). Per-window idle f: 2014-05 0.95, 2018-05 0.43, 2022-04 0.65, 2023-10 0.71. Result: **V4 +3.54pp (20.45→23.99%), V5 +2.82pp (23.67→26.49%), MaxDD UNCHANGED, Sharpe +0.1** (f=0.7 rule-of-thumb ≈ +3.4/+3.2pp; f=1.0 idealized +4.78/+4.55pp). So honest deployable uplift ≈ **+3pp CAGR, free of drawdown**.
- **Bot wiring (d) DONE**: `dna_report.py` += `get_capitulation()` (DT5G state + live oversold breadth → DORMANT/WATCH/STRONG, 5min cache) + `build_market_alert()` (returns None when dormant) + Panic line in per-ticker NOW block. `crisis_alert_push.py` pushes via `telegram_recommend.send_telegram_text` ONLY on WATCH/STRONG; wired into `papertrade_daily.bat` step [8]. Tested [REDACTED]03 = DORMANT (no false push).

**Deployable:** `crisis_capitulation_signal.py` — fully causal LIVE trigger. Gate1 DT5G state==CRISIS, Gate2 oversold breadth≥0.057, then rank 8L quality+golden+oversold candidates (liq≥2B, redflag-excl). Dormant outside crisis (prints WAIT). Tested [REDACTED]03 = NEUTRAL → correctly dormant (live snap: 764 names, 42 quality, 121 golden, 6 q+golden, but macro gate closed so no action). Output: data/crisis_capitulation_signal.{md,csv}. 9 DT5G crisis episodes 2014–2024 (46–112d each). DT5G crisis live table `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live` state 1=CRISIS.

aiTitle: Research DT5G and 8L for optimal entry points

content.text:
Xong cả hai. Tổng kết:

## 1. Bộ lọc gấu grind — đã wire vào tín hiệu live + bot

**Định nghĩa grind:** có một washout khác đã bắn 20–90 phiên trước (washout lặp), hoặc breadth vẫn đang xấu đi đều → nghi gấu grind kiểu 2022.

- **`crisis_capitulation_signal.py`**: STRONG nay tách 2 nhánh — 🔴 **STRONG_BUY** (sharp, đơn lẻ → bơm hết reserve) vs 🟠 **STRONG_CAUTION** (grind → rải lệnh, bơm ½ reserve, giữ phần còn lại cho washout kế >30 phiên). Header hiện luôn **% reserve khả dụng**.
- **`dna_report.py`** (bot): thêm level STRONG_GRIND, dòng Panic + alert đẩy phân biệt sharp/grind. Test với BEAR-grind giả lập → ra đúng tin "RẢI LỆNH, bơm ~NỬA reserve 80%".

## 2. Deploy reserve theo state — ý tưởng của bạn ĐÚNG và mạnh hơn nhiều

Mở rộng deploy `f = 1 − tỉ trọng state` (CRISIS 100%, BEAR 80%, NEUTRAL 30%, BULL/EX-BULL 0%) trên **mọi** washout, giữ 60 ngày rồi reset:

| Biến thể | V4 CAGR | V5 CAGR | MaxDD V4 | Sharpe |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Baseline | 20.45% | 23.67% | −21.8% | 1.43/1.49 |
| ALL-FULL (không lọc grind) | **29.54%** (+9.1) | **32.97%** (+9.3) | **−24.7%** ❌ | 1.53/1.59 |
| **GRIND-HALF** | 28.83% (+8.4) | 32.24% (+8.6) | −23.8% | **1.54/1.60** |
| GRIND-SKIP | 28.05% (+7.6) | 31.44% (+7.8) | −23.8% | 1.52/1.58 |

**Đọc kết quả:**
- Mở rộng sang BEAR/NEUTRAL washout (dùng reserve có sẵn của state) ăn thêm **rất nhiều** — vì bắt được 2020 COVID (BEAR, +32%), 2022-06 (+28%), 2015/2016 NEUTRAL (+17%). → Câu trả lời cho "dùng hết tiền trong dịp này rồi chờ 60 ngày reset" là **CÓ** — về mặt return.
- **NHƯNG có giá: MaxDD xấu đi** (−21.8 → −24.7%). Đây là cái khác biệt căn bản với overlay-chỉ-crisis (MaxDD không đổi): washout ngoài crisis và washout grind có thể rơi tiếp → tăng drawdown. Bạn đang nhận thêm rủi ro để đổi lấy return.
- **Bộ lọc grind giúp đúng như trực giác của bạn:** GRIND-HALF giữ ~92% lợi nhuận, **Sharpe cao nhất**, và bớt thiệt hại drawdown. GRIND-SKIP thua hơn vì cắt nhầm cả 2016-01 (một washout grind nhưng lại lời +17%). → **Hạ cấp, đừng loại bỏ.**

## ⚠️ Lưu ý trung thực về độ lớn

+9pp là **cận trên**, sẽ bị thổi vì hai lý do:
1. **Reserve lý thuyết > thực tế**: state weight là mục tiêu, nhưng V4/V5 (composite có sleeve earnings + ensemble) thực tế đầu tư nhiều hơn target — đo bằng beta ở các cửa sổ crisis cho reserve thật 0.43–0.95 vs lý thuyết 1.0 (tỉ lệ ~0.63x).
2. Mô hình "cộng thêm" hơi double-count khi core tự tái đầu tư reserve trong cửa sổ 60 ngày.

→ Áp haircut ~0.63x: **realistic ≈ +5–6pp CAGR, kèm MaxDD cao hơn ~2–3pp.** Hướng đi vững chắc, con số thì lạc quan. Vẫn là cải thiện lớn — nhưng không "miễn phí về rủi ro" như overlay-chỉ-crisis (+3pp, MaxDD không đổi).

## Khuyến nghị chốt

- **Sharp washout** (đơn lẻ): bơm **hết** reserve của state, giữ 60 ngày, reset. 
- **Grind washout** (lặp / breadth còn xấu): bơm **½** reserve, để dành cho washout kế.
- Chấp nhận MaxDD nhích lên khi chơi ngoài crisis — đây là đánh đổi return/risk có ý thức, không phải bữa trưa miễn phí.

Files: `extended_overlay_grind.py`, `washout_master_table.py`, `crisis_capitulation_signal.py` (grind+reserve), `dna_report.py` (grind+reserve), memory đã cập nhật.

Muốn tôi chạy thêm bản **realistic beta-adjusted** cho extended overlay để chốt con số +pp chính xác (thay vì ước lượng haircut), hay dừng ở đây?

content: chạy thêm bản realistic beta-adjusted cho extended overlay để chốt con số +pp chính xác

message.content: chạy thêm bản realistic beta-adjusted cho extended overlay để chốt con số +pp chính xác

content.text: Đúng, để chốt con số chính xác. Tôi sẽ tính **f thực = 1 − beta(core→thị trường)** cho từng cửa sổ washout (đo đúng lượng cash nhàn rỗi thực tế), dùng mô hình cộng đúng (`new_ret = core_ret + f·basket`), và so 3 biến thể: crisis-only, extended-all, extended-grind-half.

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
realistic_extended_overlay.py — final beta-adjusted extended overlay\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Replaces the THEORETICAL state reserve (f=1-state_weight) with the REALISTIC idle
cash measured from the core's actual equity exposure: f = clip(1 - beta(core->mkt))
over each 60d window (beta = realized exposure read from NAV co-movement). Correct
addition model: new_ret = core_ret + f*basket_ret (idle f earned ~0 in baseline,
invested 1-f keeps earning core's return -> no double-count).

Variants: CRISIS-ONLY (beta) · EXTENDED-ALL (beta, every washout) ·
EXTENDED-GRIND-HALF (beta, half deploy on repeat-washout events).
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import os, sys, io, subprocess
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
W=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"; SDK_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin"
COST=0.003; H=60
def bq(sql):
    env=dict(os.environ); env["PATH"]=env.get("PATH","")+os.pathsep+SDK_BIN
    env.setdefault("CLOUDSDK_PYTHON",SDK_BIN+r"\..\platform\bundledpython\python.exe")
    o=subprocess.run([SDK_BIN+r"\bq.cmd","query","--use_legacy_sql=false",f"--project_id={PROJECT}",
        "--format=csv","--max_rows=200000"," ".join(sql.split())],capture_output=True,text=True,env=env)
    if o.returncode!=0: raise RuntimeError(o.stdout+o.stderr)
    return pd.read_csv(io.StringIO(o.stdout))

core=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","5sys_prodspec_201401_202605_dt5g.csv"),parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")
D=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","daily_comovement_dt5g.csv"),parse_dates=["time"]).sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True)
D["ew"]=(1+D["avg_ret"]).cumprod(); ew_ret=D.set_index("time")["ew"].pct_change()
state_by=D.set_index("time")["state"]
ws=D[D["pct_oversold"]>=0.40].copy().sort_values("time"); ws["g"]=ws["time"].diff().dt.days.fillna(999); ws["c"]=(ws["g"]>=30).cumsum()
ev=sorted([(g.iloc[0]["time"], int(state_by.get(g.iloc[0]["time"],3))) for _,g in ws.groupby("c")])
def tdpos(t): return D.index[D["time"]==t][0]
events=[]
for i,(d0,st) in enumerate(ev):
    grind = i>0 and (tdpos(d0)-tdpos(ev[i-1][0]))<=90
    events.append(dict(date=d0,state=st,grind=grind))

# basket cache for ALL washout events (extend the f>0 cache with any missing)
cache=os.path.join(W,"data","_washout_baskets.csv")
B=pd.read_csv(cache,parse_dates=["time"]) if os.path.exists(cache) else pd.DataFrame(columns=["event","time","nav"])
have=set(B["event"].unique())
miss=[e for e in events if str(e["date"].date()) not in have]
if miss:
    frames=[B]
    for e in miss:
        ds=str(e["date"].date())
        q=bq(f"""WITH elig AS (SELECT p.ticker, SAFE_DIVIDE(p.PB-p.PB_MA5Y,p.PB_SD5Y) pbz0 FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune p
          WHERE p.time=DATE '{ds}' AND p.ROE_Min5Y>=0.12 AND p.ROIC5Y>=0.10 AND p.FSCORE>=6
            AND COALESCE(p.Price,p.Close)*p.Volume/1e9>=2)
          SELECT f.time,f.ticker,f.Close,e.pbz0 FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune f JOIN elig e USING(ticker)
          WHERE f.time>=DATE '{ds}' AND f.time<=DATE_ADD(DATE '{ds}',INTERVAL 130 DAY) ORDER BY f.ticker,f.time""")
        q["time"]=pd.to_datetime(q["time"]); pbz0=q.groupby("ticker")["pbz0"].first()
        g=pbz0[pbz0<-1].index.tolist(); c=pbz0[pbz0<0].index.tolist(); a=pbz0.index.tolist()
        names=g if len(g)>=3 else (c if len(c)>=3 else a)
        px=q[q.ticker.isin(names)].pivot(index="time",columns="ticker",values="Close").sort_index().ffill().iloc[:H+1]
        nav=px.div(px.iloc[0]).mean(axis=1); nav=nav/nav.iloc[0]
        frames.append(pd.DataFrame({"event":ds,"time":nav.index,"nav":nav.values}))
    B=pd.concat(frames); B.to_csv(cache,index=False)

idx=core.index
def beta_f(col,e):
    bk=B[B["event"]==str(e["date"].date())].set_index("time")["nav"]
    i0=idx.searchsorted(e["date"]); n=min(H,len(bk)-1,len(idx)-1-i0)
    if n<5: return None,None,None
    cret=core[col].pct_change().fillna(0).values
    win=slice(i0+1,i0+1+n); mkt=ew_ret.reindex(idx[win]).fillna(0).values; cc=cret[win]
    var=np.var(mkt); beta=float(np.cov(cc,mkt)[0,1]/var) if var>0 else 1.0
    f=min(max(1-beta,0),1)
    return beta,f,(i0,n,bk)
def overlay(col,scope):  # scope: 'crisis','all','grindhalf'
    ret=core[col].pct_change().fillna(0).values.copy()
    for e in events:
        if scope=="crisis" and e["state"]!=1: continue
        beta,f,info=beta_f(col,e)
        if info is None: continue
        if scope=="grindhalf" and e["grind"]: f*=0.5
        i0,n,bk=info; bret=bk.pct_change().fillna(0).values
        ret[i0+1:i0+1+n]+=f*bret[1:1+n]; ret[i0+1]-=COST*f; ret[i0+n]-=COST*f
    return pd.Series(np.cumprod(1+ret),index=idx)
def metrics(nav):
    nav=nav.dropna(); r=nav.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(nav.index[-1]-nav.index[0]).days/365.25
    return (nav.iloc[-1]**(1/yrs)-1)*100,(nav/nav.cummax()-1).min()*100,r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)

# per-event realistic f (V4)
print("per-event realistic idle-cash f = 1 - beta(core->mkt), 60d window (V4):")
print(f"  {'date':<12}{'state':>6}{'grind':>7}{'beta':>7}{'f_real':>8}")
for e in events:
    beta,f,info=beta_f("V4_V121_ENS_TQ34b",e)
    if info is None: print(f"  {str(e['date'].date()):<12}{e['state']:>6}{str(e['grind']):>7}   (censored)"); continue
    print(f"  {str(e['date'].date()):<12}{e['state']:>6}{str(e['grind']):>7}{beta:>7.2f}{f:>8.2f}")

print("\n"+"="*82)
print("REALISTIC beta-adjusted overlay (final +pp)")
print("="*82)
for sysname,col in [("V4","V4_V121_ENS_TQ34b"),("V5","V5_V4_KellyQ2")]:
    cb,db,sb=metrics(core[col])
    print(f"{sysname} baseline                  : CAGR {cb:5.2f}%  MaxDD {db:6.1f}%  Sharpe {sb:.2f}")
    for tag,sc in [("CRISIS-only (beta)","crisis"),("EXTENDED-ALL (beta)","all"),("EXTENDED-GRIND-HALF (beta)","grindhalf")]:
        nav=overlay(col,sc); cn,dn,sn=metrics(nav)
        print(f"{sysname} +overlay {tag:<26}: CAGR {cn:5.2f}%  MaxDD {dn:6.1f}%  Sharpe {sn:.2f}   ({cn-cb:+.2f}pp)")
    print()

lines: - **VERDICT: deploy the design** — overlay idle crisis cash, all-in at STRONG≥40%, hold 60d, return to core. Free Sharpe/CAGR, zero extra MaxDD.

- **REALISTIC overlay (e), `integrated_overlay_realistic.py`**: idle-cash frac = 1−beta(core→mkt) per window (beta = realized equity exposure, read from NAV co-movement; no engine surgery). Per-window idle f: 2014-05 0.95, 2018-05 0.43, 2022-04 0.65, 2023-10 0.71. Result: **V4 +3.54pp (20.45→23.99%), V5 +2.82pp (23.67→26.49%), MaxDD UNCHANGED, Sharpe +0.1** (f=0.7 rule-of-thumb ≈ +3.4/+3.2pp; f=1.0 idealized +4.78/+4.55pp). So honest deployable uplift ≈ **+3pp CAGR, free of drawdown**.

- **EXTENDED overlay — deploy STATE RESERVE on EVERY washout (not just crisis)** (`extended_overlay_grind.py`, user idea): reserve f=1−state_weight (CRISIS 1.0, BEAR 0.8, NEUTRAL 0.3, BULL/EXBULL 0=skip); deploy on washout, hold 60d, reset. new_ret=core_ret+f·basket_ret. **ALL-FULL: V4 +9.08pp (20.45→29.54%), V5 +9.30pp (→32.97%) — but MaxDD WORSENS −21.8→−24.7% / −20.2→−25.5%** (non-crisis/grind washouts can keep falling = the cost of going beyond crisis). **GRIND-HALF (½ reserve on repeat-washouts) = best: V4 +8.37pp Sharpe 1.54, V5 +8.57pp Sharpe 1.60, MaxDD −23.8/−25.4** (keeps ~92% of return, best Sharpe, less DD damage); GRIND-SKIP loses more (2016-01 grind=false-pos, a +17% event). **HONESTY: +9pp is UPPER BOUND** — theoretical state-reserve > actual exposure (beta-measured crisis reserve was 0.43-0.95 vs theoretical 1.0; realized/theoretical ≈0.63x) + addition model slight double-count → realistic ≈ **+5-6pp** with the higher MaxDD. Direction robust, magnitude optimistic.

+- **FINAL beta-adjusted extended overlay** (`realistic_extended_overlay.py`, f=clip(1−beta(core→mkt)) per 60d window = realized idle cash; correct addition model new_ret=core_ret+f·basket): **CRISIS-only beta V4 +3.79pp / V5 +3.40pp, MaxDD UNCHANGED** (the no-asterisk "free" version). **EXTENDED-GRIND-HALF beta = the winner: V4 29.98% (+9.53pp) MaxDD −21.9% (≈baseline −21.8!) Sharpe 1.64; V5 32.31% (+8.64pp) MaxDD −22.1% Sharpe 1.66.** EXTENDED-ALL (no grind filter) +10.6/9.6pp but MaxDD BLOWS OUT −29/−30% → grind filter is ESSENTIAL: it cuts the 2022 grind deploys (f=0.93,1.00) and brings MaxDD back to baseline while keeping the gains. Per-event beta-f: 2014 0.95, 2020-COVID 0.92, 2022-09 1.00 (genuinely cash-heavy); BULL 2024/2025 f≈0.67-0.69 (beta found dry powder the theoretical state-weight assumed=0 → why beta-extended > theoretical). **CAVEAT: beta=1−f OVERSTATES idle cash when core holds low-beta STOCKS (not literally cash) → +9.5pp is optimistic; robust floor = crisis-only +3.4-3.8pp (truly idle, MaxDD flat). Both proxies (theoretical +8.4, beta +9.5) bracket ~+8.5-9.5pp for grind-half. To nail exactly = instrument engine cash ledger.**

- **GRIND filter (answer to "dùng hết tiền?"): full reserve on SHARP/isolated washouts, HALF on GRIND** (a prior washout 20-90 sessions ago, or breadth still falling = 2022-style grinding bear). Downgrade, don't eliminate. Wired into both `crisis_capitulation_signal.py` (STRONG_BUY vs STRONG_CAUTION + reserve% display) and `dna_report.py` (STRONG vs STRONG_GRIND + reserve, build_market_alert). Non-crisis washouts ARE equally good buys (CRISIS +14.9% vs non-crisis +13.9% basket60, win 75% both; BULL-dip washouts win 100%) — `washout_master_table.py` (12 washouts 2014-26, all 3 losses were 2022 grind).

- **Bot wiring (d) DONE**: `dna_report.py` += `get_capitulation()` (DT5G state + live oversold breadth → DORMANT/WATCH/STRONG, 5min cache) + `build_market_alert()` (returns None when dormant) + Panic line in per-ticker NOW block. `crisis_alert_push.py` pushes via `telegram_recommend.send_telegram_text` ONLY on WATCH/STRONG; wired into `papertrade_daily.bat` step [8]. Tested [REDACTED]03 = DORMANT (no false push).
